ogTitle: Mallee vs Maloneys Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mallee and Maloneys Beach.
heading: Mallee vs Maloneys Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mallee, New South Wales and Maloneys Beach, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mallee has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Maloneys Beach (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mallee or Maloneys Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mallee has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Maloneys Beach scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mallee scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Maloneys Beach scores 20/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mallee or Maloneys Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mallee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
